steps.desc: Open compose editor and reset draft
Read back editor text and verify all sections exist

args: ${{ ({ title: args.compose?.title || '', subtitle: args.compose?.subtitle || '', content: args.compose?.content || '' }) }}

steps.desc: Ask user to verify final editor content manually

action.reason: 自动校验已通过。请再目测确认当前编辑器内容是否正确（title/subtitle/content 已按顺序写入）。正确请点“已处理，继续”；不正确请点“无法处理”。
compose sequence verify failed: missing=${vars.verifyOut.missing}; textLen=${vars.verifyOut.textLen}
